back_translation: After this, I looked, and behold, there was a door that was opened in heaven, and the first voice that I heard, like a trumpet that was speaking to me, said, ‘Come up here, and We will reveal to you what must happen after this’
Immediately, I was in the Spirit, and behold, there was a throne set up in heaven, and there was someone seated on that throne
And the One seated there had appearance like jasper-stone and carnelian, and there was a rainbow around the throne, having appearance like emerald
And around the throne, there were twenty-four other thrones. On those thrones, there were twenty-four elders sitting, dressed in white garments, and on their heads, there were golden crowns
And from the throne came lightning-flashes, voices, and thunders. And before the throne, there were seven torches of fire burning, which are the seven Spirits of God

And before the throne, there was something like a sea of glass, clear like crystal. And in the center of the throne and around the throne, there were four living-creatures, covered with eyes, in front and behind
And the first creature was like a lion, the second was like a calf, the third had a face like a man, and the fourth was like a flying eagle

And the four living-creatures, each one of them had six wings, and outside and inside they were full of eyes. And they did not stop day and night, saying, ‘Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God, the One of great mighty-power, who has existed, who exists, and who will come’
And whenever those creatures give glory and honor and thanksgiving to the One seated on the throne, the One who lives forever and ever
The twenty-four elders will fall down before the face of the One seated on the throne, and will worship the One who lives forever and ever, and will cast their crowns before the throne, saying
‘Our Lord and our God, You are worthy to receive glory, honor, and mighty-power, because You have created all things, and by Your will, all things exist and were created’
